case_title: OPORTUN, INC. VS. ARISTELA PEREIRA RODRIGUEZ

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE $55.00 - SERVED FEB-27-2019, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT RODRIGUEZ, ARISTELA PEREIRA
AMENDED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED FEB-27-2019, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT RODRIGUEZ, ARISTELA PEREIRA
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING CALENDAR OF APR-22-2019. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY, PLACED UNDER OATH AND TESTIFIED. AFTER HEARING THE EVIDENCE PRESENTED, THE COURT GRANTED JUDGMENT IN FAVOR OF PLAINTIFF. NO EXHIBIT RETAINED BY THE COURT. JUDGE JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK S. RAVINANTAPRICHA. NOT REPORTED.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $629.41 FILED BY OPORTUN, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT RODRIGUEZ, ARISTELA PEREIRA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-22-2019 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RODRIGUEZ, ARISTELA PEREIRA $629.41 PRINCIPAL, $105.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $734.41 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS, SEE JUDGMENT ATTACHED NO EXHIBITS FILED
